/home/jim/anaconda3/envs/openmm/bin/x86_64-conda-linux-gnu-c++ -fPIC -fvisibility-inlines-hidden -fmessage-length=0 -march=nocona -mtune=haswell -ftree-vectorize -fPIC -fstack-protector-strong -fno-plt -O2 -ffunction-sections -pipe -isystem /home/jim/anaconda3/envs/openmm/include -Wl,-O2 -Wl,--sort-common -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -Wl,--disable-new-dtags -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--allow-shlib-undefined -Wl,-rpath,/home/jim/anaconda3/envs/openmm/lib -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/jim/anaconda3/envs/openmm/lib -L/home/jim/anaconda3/envs/openmm/lib -shared -Wl,-soname,libOpenMMGridForce.so -o libOpenMMGridForce.so CMakeFiles/OpenMMGridForce.dir/openmmapi/src/GridForce.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenMMGridForce.dir/openmmapi/src/GridForceImpl.cpp.o   -L/usr/local/openmm/lib  -L/usr/local/openmm/lib/plugins  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/openmm/lib:/usr/local/openmm/lib/plugins: -lOpenMM
